inference_rule.inference_rule_description: Preserve existing LONG/SHORT metadata at confidence 3. For missing directions, use explicit candidate side if present, then unambiguous liquidity-side metadata, then PRE_DECISION_SWEEP_INFERENCE at confidence 2. The sweep inference inspects M5 and M1 candles only in [decision_timestamp - 60m, decision_timestamp), excludes the anchor/decision candle and all post-entry candles, requires the sweep candle to be at least 5 minutes before the decision timestamp, and requires rejection or move-away by at least the configured rejection threshold. A sweep of high/upper liquidity maps to SHORT. A sweep of low/lower liquidity maps to LONG. Multiple valid sweep events inside the same pre-entry window are resolved by the latest defensible sweep event; unresolved or cross-source conflicts return UNKNOWN.
inference_rule_allowed_inputs: explicit candidate/signal side metadata when present
unambiguous pre-entry liquidity-side metadata when present
pre-anchor sweep candle timestamp and pre-anchor rejection/move-away candles
explicit pre-entry entry/liquidity relation metadata when present
inference_rule.inference_rule_conflict_policy: If independent pre-entry sources disagree, set final_direction=UNKNOWN, direction_source=CONFLICTING_DIRECTION_EVIDENCE, confidence=0, and do not force replay.
inference_rule.inference_rule_no_evidence_policy: If no existing metadata, explicit side, liquidity-side metadata, valid pre-decision sweep, or entry/liquidity relation exists, set final_direction=UNKNOWN.
inference_rule.confidence_2_warning: Confidence 2 directions are inferred from pre-decision sweep evidence and must not be treated as equal to confidence 3 existing visual-pack metadata.

method_limitations.confidence_2_is_inferred_not_original_me: Confidence 2 directions are inferred from pre-decision sweep evidence and must not be treated as equal to confidence 3 existing visual-pack metadata.
method_limitations.pre_decision_sweep_inference_is_heuristi: The PRE_DECISION_SWEEP_INFERENCE rule is a deterministic research proxy. It is not an original strategy signal and not a deployment-quality direction source.
method_limitations.inferred_directions_must_not_be_treated_: Existing metadata keeps confidence 3; recovered sweep directions use confidence 2.
method_limitations.phase_4_blocked_until_human_methodology_: Matched-control replay remains blocked until recovered direction methodology is accepted.
method_limitations.recovered_direction_does_not_validate_ad: Direction recovery only repairs diagnostic coverage.
method_limitations.non_directional_replay_not_used_as_prima: Best-move-in-either-direction replay is not used because it changes directional semantics.
